findings.summary: Unused shell:allow-execute capability grants an arbitrary-command-execution primitive with no consumer.
findings.rootCause: Capability declared but no plugin-shell import / Command / execute() call exists in src/.
findings.fix: Removed shell:allow-execute from the capability list.
findings.verification: Tree-wide grep shows no shell execute usage; frontend type-checks.

findings.summary: Unused clipboard-manager:allow-read-text capability is a needless exfiltration surface.
findings.rootCause: App only writes the clipboard; no readText call anywhere.

findings.summary: Password generator copied via navigator.clipboard, unreliable in the WebView2 origin, failing silently with no UI feedback.
findings.rootCause: navigator.clipboard.writeText rejects in the Tauri custom-protocol origin; rejection occurred before setCopied(true).
findings.fix: Switched to @tauri-apps/plugin-clipboard-manager writeText (consistent with rest of app), wrapped in try/catch.

findings.summary: The '/' search-focus shortcut chip shown in the UI had no keyboard handler.
findings.rootCause: Global keydown handler implemented only Arrow keys, Space, Ctrl/Cmd+C.
findings.fix: Added searchInputRef and a '/' branch that focuses and selects the search input, respecting input/modal guards.

findings.summary: delete_group could delete the default group, orphaning entries' group references until next launch.
findings.rootCause: No guard for the structural-invariant default group; the Tauri command is directly invokable even though the UI hides it.
findings.fix: Early-return no-op when name == default group, enforced at the data layer.

findings.summary: generate_password returned an empty password for non-positive length and risked huge allocation for absurd length.
findings.rootCause: i32 length used unchecked; reachable via direct invoke (UI slider clamps, command does not).
findings.fix: Clamp to [MIN_LENGTH=8, MAX_LENGTH=4096]; added 2 unit tests.

findings.summary: CLAUDE.md falsely claimed the password generator is broken and told maintainers not to fix it; stale DB-path section and command list; wrong version.
findings.rootCause: Documentation not updated as code evolved.
findings.fix: Corrected the false mismatch note, DB path resolution, registered-command list, and version.

findings.summary: Copied passwords are never auto-cleared from the OS clipboard.
findings.fix: Password copies arm a 60s timer; on expiry the clipboard is wiped only if it still equals the copied secret (fail-safe clear on read error); lock clears immediately; bottom-right countdown toast. Re-added clipboard-manager:allow-read-text (intentional partial reversal of BUG-002) for the conditional check; shell:allow-execute stays removed.

findings.summary: Global Space preventDefault breaks Space-activating focused buttons.
findings.reasonNotChanged: Reveal-on-Space is intentional; narrowing it is a design decision.

findings.summary: Master row read via hard-coded WHERE id = 1 while insert does not pin id.
findings.reasonNotChanged: No reproduction; crypto-adjacent unlock path that CLAUDE.md forbids changing without a written migration.

findings.summary: Batch delete performs N sequential round-trips, each reloading entries and groups.
findings.reasonNotChanged: Correct but inefficient; proper fix is a new transactional backend command (feature addition beyond safe audit scope).

findings.summary: CSV import assumes a header row; a headerless third-party CSV silently drops its first data row.
findings.reasonNotChanged: has_headers(true) matches the app's own export format by design; changing it is a contract/UX decision.

findings.summary: computeStrength duplicated verbatim across two components; pre-existing clippy warnings (unnecessary_unwrap, too_many_arguments).
findings.reasonNotChanged: Non-behavioral cleanup; recommended but out of bug-fix scope.
